_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Logistics Product DATA Summaries
summary: This Data Item Description outlines requirements for Logistics Product Data Summaries, crucial for logistics planning, analysis, and performance verification across military system acquisitions.
use_relationship:
Logistics Product Data (LPD) Summaries consist of information required for the requiring authority to conduct logistics planning and analysis, influence program decisions, assess design status, and verify contractor performance. Requirements for these summaries shall be coordinated with data requirements of other program functional elements to minimize redundancies and inconsistencies.
a. It is not intended that all the requirements contained herein should be applied to every program. This Data Item Description (DID) should be tailored to the minimum requirements of the applicable contract or purchase order.
b. This DID is applicable to acquisitions of military systems, equipment, and components.
c. This DID supersedes DI-SESS-81759, Logistics Product Data Summaries.

references.label: Copies of these documents are available at TechAmerica©, 2500 Wilson Boulevard, Arlington, VA 22201-309 3834;

distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Referenced Documents.
preparation_instructions.content:
The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and the dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be specified in the contract.
GEIA-STD-0007, Logistics Product Data
GEIA-HB-0007, Logistics Product Data Handbook
TA-HB-0007-1, Handbook and Guide for Logistics Product Data Reports

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The format for each LPD Summary is contained in the “Report Format" section of TA-HB-0007-1 otherwise it shall be defined by the requiring authority.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The required content of each LPD Summary is defined in the “Data Source" section of TA-HB-0007-1 for the particular contracted summary. The data shall be compliant with GEIA-STD-0007 and the summary shall provide the following, otherwise the content shall be defined by the requiring authority.

children.title: Mandatory and Optional Selection Criteria.
children.content: Each LPD Summary can contain both mandatory and optional selection criteria for processing the summary's data. The selection criteria for each LPD Summary is defined in the “Report Scope” section of TA-HB-0007-1 for the particular contracted summary or as defined by the requiring authority.

children.title: Sequencing.
children.content: Each LPD Summary can contain numerous parts to the summary and is defined in the “Report Sequencing” section of TA-HB-0007-1 for the particular contracted summary or as defined by the requiring authority.

children.title: Calculations.
children.content: Each LPD Summary can contain calculations to produce the summary. The formulas for the calculations are defined in the “Processing” section of TA-HB-0007-1 for the particular contracted summary or as defined by the requiring authority.
